title: corunastylis woollsii
intro:
Corunastylis woollsii, also known as the Woolls' orchid or pinkhood, is a rare Australian orchid species. 
This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. 
The health benefits of Corunastylis woollsii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. 
Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
